links.title: ROSE: Rollout On Serving GPUs via Cooperative Elasticity for Agentic RL

primary_link.title: ROSE: Rollout On Serving GPUs via Cooperative Elasticity for Agentic RL

papers.summary:
Agentic reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as a key driver for improving the multi-step reasoning and tool-use capabilities of LLMs. However, its efficiency is bottlenecked by long-tail rollouts with multi-turn environment interactions, making static GPU provisioning a poor fit: overprovisioning wastes GPUs on stragglers, while underprovisioning increases contention and slows training.
  We observe that production serving clusters routinely leave substantial GPU compute and memory headroom.
papers.summary_zh: Agentic reinforcement learning (RL) 已成為提升 LLMs 多步驟推理和工具使用能力的一個關鍵驅動力。然而，其效率受到具有多輪環境互動的 long-tail rollouts 所瓶頸化，這使得靜態的 GPU 資源配置 (provisioning) 不合適：過度配置 (overprovisioning) 會在 stragglers 上浪費 GPU 資源，而配置不足 (underprovisioning) 則會增加競爭並減慢訓練速度。我們觀察到，生產環境中的 serving clusters 通常會保留大量的 GPU 計算和記憶體 headroom。
papers.title: ROSE: Rollout On Serving GPUs via Cooperative Elasticity for Agentic RL
papers.title_zh: ROSE: 透過 Agentic RL 的協同彈性在 Serving GPUs 上執行 Rollout

links.title: Memory Efficient Full-gradient Attacks (MEFA) Framework for Adversarial Defense Evaluations

primary_link.title: Memory Efficient Full-gradient Attacks (MEFA) Framework for Adversarial Defense Evaluations

radar.summary: This work studies the robust evaluation of iterative stochastic purification defenses under white-box adversarial attacks. radar.summary_zh: 本研究探討在white-box對抗性攻擊下，疊代隨機淨化防禦的穩健評估。我們的關鍵技術洞見是，gradient checkpointing 透過犧牲額外的重新計算來顯著降低記憶體使用量，使得透過長淨化軌跡進行精確的端到端梯度計算變得可行。這使得能夠對抗基於diffusion和Langevin的淨化防禦執行full-gradient自適應攻擊，而先前的評估通常訴諸於近似方法。

radar.title_zh: 記憶體高效的Full-gradient Attacks (MEFA) 框架用於對抗性防禦評估

links.title: From Review to Design: Ethical Multimodal Driver Monitoring Systems for Risk Mitigation, Incident Response, and Accountability in Automated Vehicles

primary_link.title: From Review to Design: Ethical Multimodal Driver Monitoring Systems for Risk Mitigation, Incident Response, and Accountability in Automated Vehicles

radar.summary: As vehicles transition toward higher levels of automation, Driver Monitoring Systems (DMS) have become essential for ensuring human oversight, safety, and regulatory compliance in a vehicle. radar.summary_zh: 隨著車輛向更高層次的自動化過渡，駕駛員監控系統 (DMS) 已變得至關重要，用於確保車輛中的人為監督、安全和法規遵從性。這些系統依賴多模態感知和AI驅動的推斷，以評估駕駛員的注意力、認知狀態以及接管控制的準備程度。儘管在技術上前景光明，但其部署帶來了一系列複雜的道德和法律挑戰——範圍從隱私和同意到數據所有權和演算法問題。
radar.title: From Review to Design: Ethical Multimodal Driver Monitoring Systems for Risk Mitigation, Incident Response, and Accountability in Automated Vehicles
radar.title_zh: 從審查到設計：用於自動駕駛汽車中風險緩解、事件響應和問責制的道德多模態駕駛員監控系統

primary_link.title: OA-WAM: Object-Addressable World Action Model for Robust Robot Manipulation

radar.summary_zh: World Action Models (WAMs) 透過共同預測場景演變和機器人動作來增強Vision-Language-Action策略，但現有方法通常將預測的世界表示為整體圖像、video tokens或global latents。當指令提及特定物件時，這些表示對於action decoder來說難以處理，尤其是在物件身份與上下文糾纏不清的場景變化下。我們提出了OA-WAM，一個Object-Addressable World Action Model。
radar.title: OA-WAM: Object-Addressable World Action Model for Robust Robot Manipulation
radar.title_zh: OA-WAM：物件可尋址的世界行動模型用於穩健的機器人操作

primary_link.title: GATHER: Convergence-Centric Hyper-Entity Retrieval for Zero-Shot Cell-Type Annotation

radar.summary: Zero-shot single-cell cell-type annotation aims to determine a cell's type from a given set of expressed genes without any training. radar.summary_zh: Zero-shot單細胞細胞類型註釋旨在在沒有任何訓練的情況下，從給定的一組表達基因中確定細胞類型。現有的基於知識圖譜的RAG方法透過從源實體擴展並依賴疊代LLM推理來檢索證據。然而，在這種設定下，每個查詢包含數十到數百個基因，其中沒有單一基因具有決定性，且標籤僅從它們的集體共現中產生。這種hyper-entity查詢從根本上挑戰了局部、實體級的檢索方法。

radar.title_zh: GATHER：以收斂為中心的Hyper-Entity檢索用於Zero-Shot細胞類型註釋

radar.summary_zh: 基於世界模型的策略評估是一個實用的代理，透過在action-conditioned video diffusion models中展開候選動作，用於測試真實世界機器人控制。隨著這些模型越來越多地採用latent diffusion modeling (LDM)，選擇正確的latent space變得至關重要。儘管現狀是使用像VAEs這樣主要為像素重建而訓練的autoencoding latent spaces，但最近的研究表明，預訓練的編碼器在representation-aligned semantic方面具有優勢。

radar.title_zh: ReActor：用於物理感知運動重定向的強化學習

radar.summary_zh: 在藥物開發等高風險領域中產品的監管審批，需要透過大規模隨機對照試驗提供安全性與有效性的統計證據。然而，這些試驗的高昂財務成本，可能會阻礙對其產品功效缺乏絕對確定性的開發者，最終扼殺了可能提供高社會效用的「moonshot」產品的開發。為了解決這種低效率問題，在本文中，我們提出了一種用於實驗的統計協議。

links.title: PrefixGuard: From LLM-Agent Traces to Online Failure-Warning Monitors

primary_link.title: PrefixGuard: From LLM-Agent Traces to Online Failure-Warning Monitors

top5.summary: Large language model (LLM) agents now execute long, tool-using tasks where final outcome checks can arrive too late for intervention. Online warning requires lightweight prefix monitors over heterogeneous traces, but hand-authored event schemas are brittle and deployment-time LLM judging is costly. We introduce PrefixGuard, a trace-to-monitor framework with an offline StepView induction step followed by supervised monitor training. StepView induces deterministic typed-step adapters from raw trac
top5.summary_zh: 大型語言模型 (LLM) agents 現在執行需要使用工具的冗長任務，但最終結果檢查可能太晚而無法及時干預。線上預警需要針對異構 traces 的輕量級 prefix monitors，然而，手動編寫的 event schemas 脆弱且部署時的 LLM 判斷成本高昂。我們引入 PrefixGuard，這是一個從 trace 到 monitor 的框架，包含離線的 StepView 歸納步驟，隨後進行 supervised monitor 訓練。StepView 從原始 trac (traces) 中誘導出確定性的 typed-step adapters。
top5.title: PrefixGuard: From LLM-Agent Traces to Online Failure-Warning Monitors
top5.title_zh: PrefixGuard：從 LLM-Agent 軌跡到線上失敗預警監控器

links.title: Transformers Efficiently Perform In-Context Logistic Regression via Normalized Gradient Descent

primary_link.title: Transformers Efficiently Perform In-Context Logistic Regression via Normalized Gradient Descent

top5.summary: Transformers have demonstrated remarkable in-context learning (ICL) capabilities. The strong ICL performance of transformers is commonly believed to arise from their ability to implicitly execute certain algorithms on the context, thereby enhancing prediction and generation. In this work, we investigate how transformers with softmax attention perform in-context learning on linear classification data. We first construct a class of multi-layer transformers that can perform in-context logistic regr
top5.summary_zh: Transformers 已展示出卓越的 in-context learning (ICL) 能力。Transformer 強大的 ICL 性能通常被認為源於它們在 context 上隱式執行某些演算法的能力，從而增強了預測和生成。在這項工作中，我們研究了具有 softmax attention 的 transformers 如何在線性分類數據上執行 in-context learning。我們首先構建了一類多層 transformers，它們可以執行 in-context logistic regr (regression)。
top5.title: Transformers Efficiently Perform In-Context Logistic Regression via Normalized Gradient Descent
top5.title_zh: Transformers 透過歸一化梯度下降有效地執行 In-Context Logistic Regression

links.title: ResiHP: Taming LLM Training Failures with Dynamic Hybrid

primary_link.title: ResiHP: Taming LLM Training Failures with Dynamic Hybrid

top5.summary: Hybrid parallelism underpins large-scale LLM training across tens of thousands of GPUs. At such scale, hardware failures on individual devices lead to performance skew across devices, diminishing overall training efficiency. Existing resilient systems overlook sequence length variability in datasets and device performance skew under hybrid parallelism. As a result, (1) iteration time fluctuations induced by sequence length variability can trigger spurious fail-slow detections, and (2) failures a
top5.summary_zh: Hybrid parallelism 是支撐數萬個 GPU 上大規模 LLM 訓練的基礎。在這種規模下，單個裝置上的硬體故障會導致裝置間的性能偏差，從而降低整體訓練效率。現有的彈性系統忽略了數據集中 sequence length 的可變性以及 hybrid parallelism 下的裝置性能偏差。因此，(1) 由 sequence length 可變性引起的迭代時間波動可能觸發虛假的 fail-slow 檢測，以及 (2) failures a (故障未得到妥善處理)。
top5.title: ResiHP: Taming LLM Training Failures with Dynamic Hybrid

links.title: Overcoming reward signal challenges: Verifiable rewards-based reinforcement learning with GRPO on SageMaker AI

primary_link.title: Overcoming reward signal challenges: Verifiable rewards-based reinforcement learning with GRPO on SageMaker AI

top5.summary: In this post, you will learn how to implement reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) to introduce verification and transparency into reward signals to improve training performance. This approach works best when outputs can be objectively verified for correctness, such as in mathematical reasoning, code generation, or symbolic manipulation tasks. You will also learn how to layer techniques like Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) and few-shot examples to further improve results. You’ll use the GSM8K dataset (Grade School Math 8K: a collection of grade school math problems) to improve math problem solving accuracy, but the techniques used here can be adapted to a wide variety of other use cases.
top5.title: Overcoming reward signal challenges: Verifiable rewards-based reinforcement learning with GRPO on SageMaker AI

links.title: Crafting Reversible SFT Behaviors in Large Language Models

primary_link.title: Crafting Reversible SFT Behaviors in Large Language Models

top5.summary: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) induces new behaviors in large language models, yet imposes no structural constraint on how these behaviors are distributed within the model. Existing behavior interpretation methods, such as circuit attribution approaches, identify sparse subnetworks correlated with SFT-induced behaviors post-hoc. However, such correlations do not imply *causal necessity*, limiting the ability to selectively control SFT-induced behaviors at inference time. We pursue an alternative b
top5.summary_zh: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) 在大型語言模型中引入了新的行為，但對這些行為在模型中的分佈方式沒有施加結構性約束。現有的行為解釋方法，例如 circuit attribution approaches，事後識別出與 SFT 引起的行為相關的稀疏子網路。然而，此類相關性並不意味著*因果必然性*，這限制了在 inference time 選擇性控制 SFT 引起的行為的能力。我們正在探索一種替代方法 b (基於明確的結構約束)。
top5.title: Crafting Reversible SFT Behaviors in Large Language Models
top5.title_zh: 在大型語言模型中設計可逆的 SFT 行為
